phrases.romaji: Aratani hajimemashō, kyō to iu hi wa atarashii desu kara...
Yume o ōkiku, ima kara hajime
ima ni shūchū, ashita ni seikō
Yuki no hana, yawaraka ni furu

phrases.english: Slow down, one step at a time
phrases.japanese: ゆっくり、一歩一歩

phrases.english: Take a breath, relax your shoulders
phrases.japanese: 息をして、肩の力を抜いて
phrases.romaji: Iki o shite, kata no chikara o nuite

phrases.japanese: じっくり待てば、答えは出る
phrases.romaji: Jikkuri matte ba, kotae wa deru

phrases.english: Don’t rush, good things take time
phrases.japanese: 急がないで、良いものは時間がかかる
phrases.romaji: Isoがないで、良いものは時間がかかる

phrases.japanese: まず聞いて、それから話す

phrases.english: The ocean sparkles, deep emerald green
phrases.japanese: 海が輝いて、深いエメラルドグリーン
phrases.romaji: Umi ga kagayaite, fukai emerarudo guriin

phrases.english: She wears bright orange, it suits her
phrases.japanese: 彼女は鮮やかなオレンジ、似合ってる
phrases.romaji: Kanojo wa azayaka na orenji, nia teru

phrases.english: This gray sweater keeps me warm
phrases.japanese: このグレーのセーター、暖かいよ
phrases.romaji: Kono gurei no sētā, atatakai yo

phrases.english: The cherry blossoms are pale, soft pink
phrases.japanese: 桜の花、淡い優しいピンク
phrases.romaji: Sakura no hana, awai yasashii pinku

phrases.english: His suit is dark navy, very formal
phrases.japanese: 彼のスーツ、濃い紺色でとてもフォーマル
phrases.romaji: Kare no sūtsu, koi kon'iro de totemo fōmaru
Ongaku ga suki, gitaa o hiku
Shashin o toru, seikatsu o tsukamu
Supoatsu o suru, kenkoo o mamoru
Eiga o miru, kanjoo o kanjiru
watashi no kokoro, anata no tame ni
Yorokobi o mitsuke, ai o kaku
Shiawase ni nare, jiyuu ni nare

phrases.english: Mom, help me with homework, please
phrases.japanese: お母さん、宿題を手伝って
お兄ちゃんはどこ？Papā

phrases.english: Grandma makes the best cookies, doesn’t she?
phrases.japanese: おばあちゃんのクッキーは最高だよね
phrases.romaji: Obā-chan no kukkī wa saikō da yo ne

phrases.english: Sis, can you fix my shirt?
phrases.japanese: 姉さん、 shirt 直してくれる？

phrases.english: Our family trips are memorable, aren’t they?
phrases.japanese: 家族旅行は思い出深いよね
phrases.romaji: Kazoku ryokō wa omoide fukai yo ne

phrases.english: Breathe in deeply, hold, exhale slowly
phrases.japanese: 深呼吸をして、止めて、ゆっくり吐いて
phrases.romaji: Shin kokyū o shite, tomete, yukkuri haite

phrases.english: Feel your feet on the ground, steady and calm
phrases.japanese: 足の裏で地面を感じて、落ち着いて
phrases.romaji: Ashi no ura de jimen o kanjite, ochitsuite

phrases.english: Notice the sounds, only listen, let go
phrases.japanese: 音を感じて、ただ聞いて、手放して
phrases.romaji: Oto o kanjite, tada kiite, tehanashite

phrases.english: Smile softly, relax your shoulders, soften your jaw
phrases.japanese: 優しく笑って、肩を緩めて、顎を柔らかく
phrases.romaji: Yasashiku waratte, kata o yurumete, ago o yawarakaku

phrases.english: Watch your thoughts, like clouds passing by
phrases.japanese: 考えを雲のようにただ見送って
phrases.romaji: Kangae o kumo no yō ni tada miokotte

phrases.english: Rain drops, cleanse the earth softly.
phrases.japanese: 雨が地球を優しく洗う。
phrases.romaji: Ame ga chikyū o yasashiku arau.

phrases.english: Stars twinkle, the sky’s quiet light.
phrases.japanese: 星が瞬き、空の静かな光。
phrases.romaji: Hoshi ga matataki, sora no shizuka na hikari.

phrases.english: Ponds hold the sky, still and clear.
phrases.japanese: 池は空を静かに映す。
phrases.romaji: Ike wa sora o shizuka ni utsusu.

phrases.japanese: 風が松を通り抜け、歌う…
phrases.romaji: Kaze ga matsu o tōrinuki, utau...

phrases.english: Dawn breaks, another day begins gently.
phrases.japanese: 夜明けが来て、また穏やかな日は始まる。
phrases.romaji: Yoake ga kite, mata odayaka na hi wa hajimaru.

phrases.japanese: 歩くこと、身体を動かそう
毎日笑う、免疫力アップ
カラフルな食事、栄養を取る
深呼吸して、心を落ち着け
phrases.romaji: Shin kokyū shite, kokoro o ochitsukete

phrases.japanese: 甘いもの控えて、賢く選ぼう
phrases.romaji: Amai mono hikae te, kashikoku erabō

phrases.japanese: 毎日一つをシンプルにしよう
phrases.romaji: Mainichi hitotsu o shinpuru ni shiyou

phrases.english: Repeat until it flows naturally, eh?
phrases.japanese: 自然に出るまで繰り返せ、ね?
phrases.romaji: Shizen ni deru made kurikaese, ne?

phrases.japanese: 今日の目標は一つだけ
phrases.romaji: Kyou no mokuhyou wa hitotsu dake

phrases.english: Use what you learn, don’t just memorize
phrases.japanese: 覚えるだけじゃなくて、学んだことを使おう
phrases.romaji: Oboeru dake ja nakute, mananda koto tsukaou

phrases.english: Small steps daily, huge leaps soon
phrases.japanese: 小さな一歩ずつ、やがて大きく跳べる
phrases.romaji: Chiisana ippo zutsu, yagate ookiku toberu

phrases.english: Monday, back to work, I guess
phrases.japanese: 月曜日だ、仕事に戻ろう
金曜日だ、あと少し頑張ろう

phrases.english: Noon, time for lunch, let's go
phrases.japanese: 正午だ、昼ご飯に行こう
phrases.romaji: Shōgo da, hiru gohan ni ikou

phrases.japanese: 深夜だ、もうすぐ寝よう
朝ご飯だ、一日をしっかり始めよう
phrases.romaji: Asagohan da, ichinichi o shikkari hajimeyou

phrases.english: I check my schedule, then start work
phrases.japanese: 予定を確認して, それから仕事します
phrases.romaji: yotei wo kakunin shite, sorekara shigoto shimasu

phrases.english: I take a short break, relax a little
phrases.japanese: 少し休んで, ほっとします

phrases.english: I go to lunch, quickly, with friends
phrases.japanese: 昼ごはんへ行って, 友だちとすぐ食べます
phrases.romaji: hirugohan e itte, tomodachi to sugu tabemasu

phrases.english: I study in the evening, focused, quietly
phrases.japanese: 夕方に勉強して, 集中して, 静かに
phrases.romaji: yuugata ni benkyou shite, shuu chuu shite, shizuka ni

phrases.english: I wind down at night, set tomorrow ready
phrases.japanese: 夜は落ち着いて, 明日の準備をします
phrases.romaji: yoru wa ochitsuite, ashita no junbi wo shimasu

phrases.japanese: 間違っても大丈夫、学ぼう
今ここを、集中して
少しずつ、進歩が見える
心静かに、気持ちを整えて
phrases.romaji: Kokoro shizuka ni, kimochi o totonoete

phrases.english: Patience is power, use it wisely
phrases.japanese: 忍耐は力なり、賢く使おう
phrases.romaji: Nintai wa chikara nari, kashikoku tsukaou

phrases.english: I feel grateful, thank you for helping.
phrases.japanese: ありがたい, 手伝ってくれてありがとう。

phrases.english: I feel proud, I did my best.
phrases.japanese: 誇らしい, 最善を尽くした。

phrases.english: I feel annoyed, that noise is loud.
phrases.japanese: イライラする, その音がうるさい。
phrases.romaji: ira ira suru, sono oto ga urusai

phrases.english: I feel worried, what if something goes wrong?
phrases.japanese: 不安だ, 何か起きないかな。

phrases.english: I feel hopeful, tomorrow will be better.
phrases.japanese: 希望がある, 明日はきっと良い。
phrases.romaji: kibou ga aru, ashita wa kitto ii
Koko de, kanai o suru no desu ka
Hassō wa, nan nichi desu ka

phrases.english: Forgive me if I overstepped, I was wrong...
phrases.japanese: 踏み込みすぎたらゴメン、間違ってた...

phrases.english: I regret my words, please accept my apology...
phrases.japanese: 言葉を regret、 apology 受け取ってください...
phrases.romaji: Kotoba o regureitto, aporoji uketotte kudasai...

phrases.english: Let’s put this behind us, okay?
phrases.japanese: これ以上は考えないで、ね？

phrases.english: I didn’t mean to bother you, sorry...
phrases.japanese: 迷惑かけてごめんね...

phrases.english: Everyone makes mistakes, let’s try again...
phrases.japanese: 誰でも失敗するから、もう一度頑張ろう...
phrases.romaji: Dare demo shippai suru kara, mou ichido ganbarou...
Yokatta ki ga suru, yokatta koto o suru
Sei o aisuru, shiawase ni ikiru

phrases.english: Dad, I got a new job, yeah!
phrases.japanese: パパ、就職したよ！

phrases.english: Bro, don’t eat my snack, okay?
phrases.japanese: お兄ちゃん、私のお菓子食べないで
phrases.romaji: Onii-chan, watashi no okashi tabenai de

phrases.japanese: おじいちゃんは園芸が大好きだよね
phrases.romaji: Ojii-chan wa engei ga daisuki da yo ne

phrases.japanese: 晩ご飯作ろっか、ママ

phrases.english: My sister’s wedding is soon, isn’t it?
phrases.japanese: 姉の結婚式、もうすぐだよね
phrases.romaji: Ane no kekkon-shiki, mō sugu da yo ne
Osore o mae ni, yūsha ni nare
Ippo o fumidasu, jibun o shinjite
watashi no ai, watashi no inochi
anata no me ni, watashi no kokoro
Sei o aisuru, kanzen ni ikiru

phrases.english: Wake up early, drink water, stretch your body
phrases.japanese: 早起きして、水を飲んで、体を伸ばしましょう
phrases.romaji: Hayai ni okite, mizu o nonde, karada o nobashimashou

phrases.english: Brush teeth, wash face, feel refreshed
phrases.japanese: 歯を磨いて、顔を洗って、さっぱりしましょう
phrases.romaji: Ha o migaite, kao o aratte, sappari shimashou

phrases.english: Check phone, read news, plan your day
phrases.japanese: 携帯を確認して、ニュースを読んで、今日の予定を立てて
phrases.romaji: Keitai o kakuninshite, nyuusu o yonde, kyō no yotei o tate te

phrases.english: Put on clothes, tie your shoes, let's go out
phrases.japanese: 服を着て、靴を履いて、外出しましょう
phrases.romaji: Fuku o kite, kutsu o haite, gaishutsu shimashou

phrases.english: Make coffee, toast bread, eat breakfast
phrases.japanese: コーヒーを入れて、トーストを焼いて、朝ごはんを食べましょう
phrases.romaji: Kōhī o irete, tōsuto o yaitte, asagohan o tabemashou
Iki wa fukaku, kurashikata wa ososuku
Shizen o ai suru, seimei o sonkei suru
Tooi tokoro e, atarashii koto o hakken suru
Suītsu o taberu, seikatsu o tanoshimu
Gengogaku o suru, hito o tsunagu
Haikingu o suru, shizen o kanjiru
Yōga o suru, kokoro o yasumu
